backend/main.mo: Main Motoko canister implementing authorization, user profiles, product management, and other production-related CRUD logic with admin/user access control and migration support.
backend/migration.mo: Defines the legacy actor state shape and a no-op migration function that currently returns the old state unchanged.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting a backend/frontend consistency fix for total operator hours, listing affected files, dependencies, tests, and confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten high-level summaries of frontend source files, components, hooks, pages, and infrastructure for build and feature planning.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS and design tokens defining light/dark themes, color variables, layout primitives, and base element styling.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point configuring PWA metadata, icons, theme colors, and service worker registration for offline and mobile support.
frontend/public/assetlinks.json: Android Digital Asset Links file enabling URL handling delegation for Trusted Web Activity verification.
frontend/public/manifest.json: PWA manifest defining app metadata, icons, display modes, shortcuts, and install behavior.
frontend/public/sw.js: Service worker implementing precaching and runtime caching with cache-first, network-first, and stale-while-revalidate strategies.
frontend/public/TWA_SETUP.md: Step-by-step documentation for packaging the web app as an Android APK using Trusted Web Activity.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component providing theme support, tab-based navigation, lazy-loaded Data Entry and Admin panels, and shared layout.
frontend/src/components/admin/MachinesMa: Admin CRUD interface for machines with sorting, dialogs for add/edit, delete confirmation, and backend integration via query hooks.
frontend/src/components/admin/OperatorsM: Admin CRUD interface for operators with client-side sorting, add/edit dialogs, deletion, and query hook integration.
frontend/src/components/admin/ProductsMa: Admin CRUD interface for products including multiple numeric fields, client-side sorting, validation, and add/edit dialogs.
frontend/src/components/admin/ReportsVie: Complex reporting UI that fetches and filters production entries by multiple criteria and supports exporting, sharing, and deleting records.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders a simple footer with copyright text, a heart icon, and a link to caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky application header showing the app title and a button to toggle between light and dark themes.
frontend/src/components/LoadingPanel.tsx: Reusable loading panel that displays a spinning loader icon and an optional message.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: File exists but currently contains no implementation.
frontend/src/components/MasterDataLoadEr: Displays a destructive alert for data load failures with an optional retry button.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupDial: File exists but currently contains no implementation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches a backend actor based on authentication state, initializes access control, and refreshes dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout, persisted identity loading, and detailed login status flags.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for authentication checks, admin detection, and CRUD-style queries/mutations against the backend actor for products, machines, operators, and production entries with caching and error handling.
frontend/src/index.css: Configures Tailwind CSS base styles, theme variables for light/dark modes, shared UI tokens, and a small component override for scrollable Radix select menus.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app, wrapping it with React Query and Internet Identity providers and loading global styles.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Implements an admin dashboard page with tabbed navigation for managing products, machines, operators, and viewing reports.
frontend/src/pages/DataEntryPage.tsx: Implements a data entry form for recording production entries, loading master data, calculating targets and operator hours in real time, and submitting entries to the backend.
frontend/src/utils/backendError.ts: Maps raw backend or actor errors into normalized, user-friendly error messages based on common patterns.
frontend/src/utils/operatorHours.ts: Contains business logic utilities to calculate adjusted duty time, total operator hours, and formatted time intervals based on production rules.
frontend/src/utils/timeFormat.ts: Provides a shared utility to format seconds into a rounded, zero-padded minutes-and-seconds string.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions to read URL parameters from query strings or hash-based routes, persist them in sessionStorage, and retrieve or clear them across navigation. Includes logic to prioritize URL values, handle storage errors safely, and remove sensitive parameters from the URL hash without page reload.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining content sources, dark-mode strategy, container defaults, and extensive theme extensions for colors, radius, shadows, and animations. Integrates typography, container queries, and animation plugins and maps design tokens via CSS variables.
project_state.json: Machine-readable snapshot of the project’s current scope and evolution, including schema/versioning, a high-level app summary, and a detailed list of existing features with IDs, descriptions, and versions. Serves as a canonical reference for build planning, feature tracking, and future changes.
